import * as yargs from "yargs"; import { getConfig } from "@tanstack/router-generator"; import { generate } from "./generate.js"; import { watch } from "./watch.js"; main(); function main() { yargs.scriptName("tsr").usage("$0 <cmd> [args]").command("generate", "Generate the routes for a project", async () => { const config = getConfig(); await generate(config, process.cwd()); }).command( "watch", "Continuously watch and generate the routes for a project", () => { watch(process.cwd()); } ).help().argv; } export { main }; //# sourceMappingURL=index.js.map
